zh.Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德
zh.lifeSummary: John George Denison於1513年出生在英國賀特福爾利。他於大約1540年與Mary Goode在英國賀特福爾利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1604年7月在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年91歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John George Denison于1513年出生在英国賀特福爾利。他于大约1540年与Mary Goode在英国賀特福爾利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1604年7月在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年91岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Denison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of a Slavic patronymic from the personal name Denis or Denys , such as Russian Denisov or Ukrainian Denysenko or Denysevych.

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: John George Denison was born in 1513, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England. He married Mary Goode about 1540, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in July 1604, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 91, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John George Denison est né en 1513, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mary Goode environ 1540, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1604, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1604 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John George Denisonは1513年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーで生まれた。約1540年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーでMary Goodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1604年7月にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで91歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Thorley, Hampshire, England: 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 토를리
ko.lifeSummary: John George Denison(은)는 1513년 영국 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 Mary Goode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1604년 7월 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.Thorley, Hampshire, England: таурли, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: John George Denison родился в 1513 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Goode около 1540 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер июль 1604 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.
